tagline: You've worked hard for your backyard. So will we.

hero.headline: 19 Years of Pools Done Right
hero.subheadline: Your backyard should be your escape, not your weekend chore. GL Pools handles every detail so all you do is enjoy crystal-clear water, week after week. Family-owned, no contracts, and a 99% retention rate that speaks for itself.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a Team<br class="hidden md:block"> That Treats It Like Their Own
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to major repairs, GL Pools covers every aspect of pool ownership so you never have to worry about a thing.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, brushing, vacuuming, and filter cleaning every single week. Your pool stays swim-ready so you just show up and dive in.

cards.title: Pool & Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, automation systems — we diagnose and fix it right. Authorized service for Pentair, Raypak, and Jandy with fast turnaround.

cards.title: Algae Cleanup & Recovery
cards.description: Green pool? We bring it back to crystal clear in days, not weeks. Targeted treatment that eliminates algae at the source.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, heaters, automation, and energy-efficient upgrades from the top manufacturers in the industry.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Dedicated service teams for hotels, HOAs, apartment complexes, and fitness facilities. Compliance-ready programs tailored to your property.

cards.title: NPA Certified Pool Startups
cards.description: National Plaster Association certified startup services for new pool fills. Proper chemical balance and surface protection from day one.

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments, no surprises.

steps.title: We Show Up & Handle It All
steps.description: One of our 50+ background-checked technicians arrives on schedule. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — everything covered, every visit.

steps.title: You Just Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready, week after week. If anything is ever off, we come back and fix it — no questions asked.

about.label: Why San Diego Trusts GL Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 2006, Built on Doing Things Right
about.description: Founded by Austin Gardiner in 2006, GL Pools has grown from a one-man operation to a team of 50+ trained technicians serving thousands of pools across all of San Diego County. With three local offices and a 99% client retention rate — on a no-contract basis — we earn your trust every single visit. Every technician is background-checked, and we are proudly certified by the National Plaster Association.

features.title: Background-Checked Technicians
features.description: Every technician passes a thorough background check before ever stepping foot in your backyard. Your family's safety comes first.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. Our 99% retention rate proves the model works.

features.title: 3 Local Offices Across San Diego
features.description: Central, Eastern, and Northern offices mean faster response times and technicians who know your neighborhood.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no penalties.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no extra charge. No fine print, no runaround. We have maintained a 99% client retention rate for nearly two decades because we stand behind every visit until your pool looks perfect.

faqs.question: How fast can GL Pools start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies or urgent repairs, we offer priority response from whichever of our three San Diego offices is closest to you.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will receive a service summary after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are your technicians background-checked?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single one. All 50+ of our technicians pass a comprehensive background check before they ever visit a client's home. Your family's safety and peace of mind are non-negotiable.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. We never require contracts — that is how confident we are in our service. Our 99% client retention rate proves most people never want to leave.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve hotels, resorts, HOAs, fitness centers, and apartment communities across San Diego County with dedicated service teams, flexible scheduling, and compliance-ready maintenance programs.

testimonials.name: Emily F.
testimonials.text: GL Pools is a great pool servicing company. They always leave with our pool looking great. Consistent, reliable, and we never have to worry about a thing.

testimonials.name: Faron E.
testimonials.text: Really enjoy the service and the quality of service. Would recommend to anyone looking for a pool company that actually cares about doing the job right.

testimonials.name: JD O.
testimonials.text: We love having GL Pools take care of our pool. Brian is excellent and always happy to work with us on scheduling. Truly a great team to work with.

benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
